docket_entries.description: ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,400.89 FILED BY KHANNA, RAJESH AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-22-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHANNA, RAJESH AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF CERTIFIED MAIL RECEIVED AFTER CASE HAD BEEN DISMISSED. SERVED JAN-26-2026, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.
